scope: ABB ISA W3C HMI evidence review

no next-version implementation before 3 rounds and 12 answers

negative_runs: first domain-filter attempt parsed a comma list as one invalid space-separated domain string
second attempt retrieved results but cp1252 could not write to the Chinese _通信 path
retry wrote to ASCII path F:/abb_wh_work/research/0716 successfully

post-write inline Python report-size probe received a Chinese filename mangled as question marks through PowerShell and raised WinError 123; JSON validation had already passed and the report was rechecked with PowerShell -LiteralPath

experiment registry and three input modes audit
